creator: devin@sevenlayer.studio
text:
Hi,

Thanks for your submission to upgrade graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool to 6.94.

I have followed the policy until now of only tracking those releases 
designated as "production releases" by Phil Harvey on the exiftool 
website.

According to the page at 
http://www.sno.phy.queensu.ca/~phil/exiftool/history.html the current 
production release is still 6.90, the current port version.

So, unless this update fixes a critical bug or introduces some new feature 
we can't live without, I would prefer to wait until Phil designates a new 
production release before updating the port.

Thanks,
-- 
Tod McQuillin

On Sun, 19 Aug 2007, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool,
>
> Please note that PR ports/115625 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/115625
>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
